title: John's Enhanced - Dynamic Entities - Alacrity Addon
description: Alacrity addon - Adding complex and dynamic entity models and animations
body:
### Warning!
Optifine is currently not supported, EMF is required
About the Pack
# 

This resource pack introduces custom entity models (CEM) and animations, combining all my experience and countless hours of work to bring dynamic and interactive entities to life in Minecraft. The result is a more immersive experience, with entities that feel truly alive and responsive.

Currently, the pack is in alpha and is actively being developed as an addon for Alacrity until more feature complete and will likely then be released as a standalone default MC style version.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EI85pehmXe8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# Bells:

Detailed CEM model
Bells have a natural sway in the wind
Realistic ringing animation

# Beds:

Detailed CEM model
Sheets adapt to player sleeping

# Chests:

Detailed CEM model
New opening/closing animation
Small chests when hovered over will slightly open to suggest you can open the chest
Hovered lid open feature dynamically adjusts itself. If the player is ontop of the chest the lid will be push closed.
Waterlogged chest variant (Moss growth) + adjusted opening/closing animations
Waterlogged chests that do not have a solid block will have a floating animation
Floating chests will react to the player standing ontop of them

# Ender Chests:

Same as normal chests but have a unique blink idle state that can play

# Boats:

Detailed CEM model
Realistic swaying effect in water (Credit to fresh animations - modified animation)
Sail open and closed state when ridden/not ridden
Realistic sail dynamics and wind effects
Realistic rope attachment dynamics 
Renaming any boat "no_sail" will give a variant without the sail component
Paddle animations between idle and moving states

# Minecarts:
Detailed CEM model

</details>

## Requirements & Recommendations

To use this resource pack, [Alacrity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/alacrity) is required.

Required Mods:

 - Fabric (Optifine is no longer recommended)
 - EMF ([Entity Model Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features) – for CEM models)
 - ETF ([Entity Texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) – for CEM models)

## Credits

The texture work is primarily derived from the Satellence and Alacrity pack addons.

A special thanks to Fresh Animations for their foundational work:

The initial chest structure served as a valuable starting point for the animation (though it has since been completely reworked, I wanted to acknowledge its contribution to the process).
The base boat animation, which I modified for this pack.

Credit also to FreshLX and the ([Fresh Animations Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations)) pack for the inspiration and resources.
## 

Enjoy!

## 
Patreon support available, my work is and will always stay free. Access early previews
